name: @hot-updater/root
description: React Native OTA solution for self-hosted

scripts.e2e:maestro:ios: pnpm run e2e:maestro:ios:release-ota-recovery && node ./e2e/maestro/scripts/run-flow.mjs --platform ios --flow ./e2e/maestro/flows/runtime-channel-switch-reset.yaml --reuse-app && node ./e2e/maestro/scripts/run-flow.mjs --platform ios --flow ./e2e/maestro/flows/numeric-cohort-rollout.yaml --reuse-app && node ./e2e/maestro/scripts/run-flow.mjs --platform ios --flow ./e2e/maestro/flows/targeted-cohort-switchback.yaml --reuse-app && node ./e2e/maestro/scripts/run-flow.mjs --platform ios --flow ./e2e/maestro/flows/force-update-auto-reload.yaml --reuse-app && node ./e2e/maestro/scripts/run-flow.mjs --platform ios --flow ./e2e/maestro/flows/disabled-bundle-rollback-to-builtin.yaml --reuse-app && node ./e2e/maestro/scripts/run-flow.mjs --platform ios --flow ./e2e/maestro/flows/disabled-bundle-rollback-to-previous-ota.yaml --reuse-app
scripts.e2e:maestro:android: pnpm run e2e:maestro:android:release-ota-recovery && node ./e2e/maestro/scripts/run-flow.mjs --platform android --flow ./e2e/maestro/flows/runtime-channel-switch-reset.yaml --reuse-app && node ./e2e/maestro/scripts/run-flow.mjs --platform android --flow ./e2e/maestro/flows/numeric-cohort-rollout.yaml --reuse-app && node ./e2e/maestro/scripts/run-flow.mjs --platform android --flow ./e2e/maestro/flows/targeted-cohort-switchback.yaml --reuse-app && node ./e2e/maestro/scripts/run-flow.mjs --platform android --flow ./e2e/maestro/flows/force-update-auto-reload.yaml --reuse-app && node ./e2e/maestro/scripts/run-flow.mjs --platform android --flow ./e2e/maestro/flows/disabled-bundle-rollback-to-builtin.yaml --reuse-app && node ./e2e/maestro/scripts/run-flow.mjs --platform android --flow ./e2e/maestro/flows/disabled-bundle-rollback-to-previous-ota.yaml --reuse-app
scripts.e2e:maestro: pnpm run e2e:maestro:ios && pnpm run e2e:maestro:android
scripts.release: pnpm clear && pnpm build && nx release --skip-publish
